templates.name: Mutual Intimate Consent Agreement
templates.description: Contemporaneous record of mutual, voluntary, and informed consent between two adults. Includes sobriety affirmation, capacity verification, right-to-withdraw clause, and biometric authentication.

templates.name: House Guest Liability Waiver
templates.description: Liability waiver for homeowners hosting guests. Covers slip-and-fall, pool and hot tub use, property damage, pet interactions, and emergency medical authorization.

templates.name: Personal Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Confidentiality agreement for personal and dating contexts. Covers photos, conversations, personal information, social media restrictions, and deletion obligations.

templates.name: Event Host Liability Waiver
templates.description: Waiver for hosting parties, gatherings, and events. Includes alcohol assumption of risk, injury waiver, photo/video consent options, and guest conduct rules.

templates.name: Freelancer Service Agreement
templates.description: Complete freelance engagement contract. Covers scope of work, milestones, payment terms, IP ownership options, revision limits, and termination procedures.

templates.name: Roommate Agreement
templates.description: Shared living arrangement terms covering rent split, utilities, guest policy, quiet hours, cleaning schedules, move-out procedures, and dispute resolution.

templates.name: Vehicle Lending Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for lending your car to someone. Covers insurance responsibility, permitted use, geographic restrictions, damage liability, and pre-lending condition inspection.

templates.name: Pet Sitting Agreement
templates.description: Pet care liability agreement with feeding schedules, medication instructions, emergency vet authorization, spending limits, and property access terms.

templates.name: Photo & Video Release
templates.description: Consent to use someone's likeness in photos and video. Configurable for commercial or personal use, social media posting, editing rights, and revocation terms.

templates.name: Property Access Agreement
templates.description: Authorization for someone to access your home or space. Covers key/code sharing, permitted areas, restricted zones, security systems, and liability.

templates.name: Digital Content License
templates.description: License agreement for digital content and creative work. Covers usage rights, exclusivity, attribution, commercial vs non-commercial use, and IP transfer options.

intimate.name: Intimate & Personal Consent
intimate.description: Agreements for intimate and personal encounters

property.name: Property & Living
property.description: Agreements for property access, vehicle lending, and shared living

business.name: Business & Services
business.description: Agreements for freelance work, service engagements, and business relationships

personal.name: Personal & Social
personal.description: Agreements for events, NDAs, pet care, and personal interactions

creative.name: Creative & Content
creative.description: Agreements for photo/video releases, content licensing, and creative work
